role: This file is the global subscription-based data store for the board/noticeboard view, mirroring the channel/session store pattern by fetching /api/board and holding normalized raw rows plus view-open state.
capabilities: Fetch /api/board and normalize response into BoardRow objects
Maintain loading, error, open, and rows state
Provide a useBoard hook that subscribes components to store updates
Guard against stale requests with a loadSeq race counter
Expose openBoard/closeBoard actions that refresh data on open
substance_why: The store fetches and normalizes board rows and manages basic view state, but retry-on-error, real startup logic, grouping, filtering, selection, refresh, and request cancellation are absent or stubbed.
interactions_present: Opening the board triggers a fresh /api/board load
Components subscribe to state changes via useBoard
interactions_missing: Retry action after a load error
Auto-refresh or polling while the board is open
Grouping, filtering, sorting, or search interactions
Selection or navigation into a board item
performance_risks: Every subscriber re-renders on any state change because there are no selectors or scoped subscriptions
forceUpdate via useState increments causes unconditional hook re-renders
No AbortController or request cancellation, so stale responses may still be processed briefly before the loadSeq check
loadBoard is called on every openBoard without deduplication or caching
reuse_why: The fetch endpoint, normalization shape, and subscription pattern are worth preserving, but the store should be rebuilt with proper state isolation, selectors, cancellation, retry, and real lifecycle logic.
decomposition_hints: Split data fetching and normalization from UI view-state (open/loading/error)
Extract the subscription mechanism into a reusable store primitive shared with channel/session stores
Move grouping, filtering, and sorting into dedicated selector/adapter modules
Separate retry, refresh, and polling concerns from the core load action
